about.title: The Trusted Gay Massage Directory
about.desc: MasseurMatch is the premier platform for verified male massage therapists to showcase their expertise and connect with men seeking trusted, gay-friendly wellness and bodywork services.
about.missionTitle: Creating a safe space for men's wellness
about.missionDesc: We believe every man deserves access to quality massage therapy in a safe, inclusive environment. Our mission is to build a trusted gay massage directory where professional male massage therapists grow their practice and clients find identity-verified, gay-friendly professionals with confidence.
about.value1Desc: Every profile is reviewed before going live — including identity verification and AI-powered content moderation. We do not verify professional licenses or conduct background checks.
about.value2Desc: We foster a supportive, gay-friendly community of male wellness professionals and clients. Everyone is welcome, and inclusion is at our core.
about.value3Desc: Flexible tools and subscription plans designed to help male massage therapists grow their practice and reach more men seeking quality bodywork.
about.value4Desc: We maintain the highest standards to ensure clients receive exceptional men's wellness experiences from verified, professional male massage therapists.
about.seoP1: MasseurMatch is a comprehensive gay massage directory connecting men with identity-verified male massage therapists across the United States. Our platform specializes in helping gay, bisexual, and queer men find professional, trusted bodywork services.
about.seoP2: Whether you're searching for deep tissue massage, Swedish relaxation massage, sports recovery, hot stone therapy, Thai massage, or therapeutic wellness bodywork from a male therapist, MasseurMatch makes it easy to find, compare, and contact providers directly.
about.seoP3: Every male massage therapist in our directory goes through a multi-step review including identity verification and AI content moderation before going live. We do not verify professional licenses. We're proud to serve the LGBTQ+ community with a safe, professional, and inclusive platform.

safety.title: Safety Guidelines
safety.notice1: MasseurMatch is an advertising directory only. We connect users with providers who pay to advertise their services on our platform.
safety.notice2: We do not verify any provider's licenses, credentials, identity, or qualifications. We do not guarantee any services, outcomes, or provider conduct.
safety.notice3: We do not process bookings or payments. All arrangements are made directly between users and providers.
safety.notice4: Users must be 18 years or older. Adult or sexual content is strictly prohibited.
safety.tip1Desc: MasseurMatch does not verify providers. Always research a provider independently — check reviews, ask for references, and verify credentials on your own.
safety.tip2Desc: Have a phone or video call before your first appointment. Discuss expectations, services, and pricing upfront. Trust your instincts.
safety.tip3Desc: Choose providers who operate from professional studios or established locations. For outcall services, let someone know where you'll be.
safety.tip4Desc: If a provider behaves inappropriately, violates policies, or makes you uncomfortable, contact us immediately through our Contact page.
safety.reportDesc: If you encounter any issues, inappropriate behavior, or policy violations, please let us know.

pricing.tag: Advertising Plans for Male Massage Therapists
pricing.title: Choose Your Advertising Plan
pricing.desc: Compare Free, Standard, Pro, and Elite placements built to help your profile earn more visibility.
pricing.freeDesc: A basic listing for getting discovered without a monthly cost.
pricing.standardDesc: A stronger everyday plan with better placement and light analytics.
pricing.proDesc: Our most popular growth tier for therapists who want top exposure.
pricing.eliteDesc: Everything in Pro plus a second active city for broader reach.
pricing.tableProExtras: Homepage rotation, weekly specials, Verified badge
pricing.tableEliteExtras: 2 active ads in 2 cities, everything in Pro
pricing.faqDisclaimer: All plans are advertising placements only. "Featured," "Boosted," and similar labels do not imply endorsement, verification, or recommendation by MasseurMatch.
pricing.addonsDesc: Static informational upgrades for now. Individual Stripe add-on checkouts can be added next.
pricing.faqQ1: Can I change plans at any time?
pricing.faqA1: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your listing at any time, and billing will follow Stripe's proration rules.
pricing.faqQ2: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faqA2: We accept major credit and debit cards through our secure Stripe checkout.
pricing.faqA3: Yes. Paid plans include a 14-day free trial, and the first 50 members receive 50% off for the first 3 months after trial.
pricing.faqQ4: How does verification work for male massage therapists?
pricing.faqA4: MasseurMatch does not verify licenses, credentials, or qualifications. Verified badges and placement labels indicate paid advertising features only, so users should still do their own due diligence.
pricing.faqA5: Absolutely. MasseurMatch was built as a trusted, inclusive directory for gay-friendly male massage therapists and their clients.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about our directory.
faq.a1: MasseurMatch is an advertising directory that helps men find male massage therapists. We are not a marketplace — we do not arrange, provide, or guarantee any services. Providers pay to advertise their listings on our platform.
faq.a2: No. We do not verify licenses, credentials, certifications, or qualifications of any provider. Listings are self-reported advertisements. We encourage users to conduct their own due diligence before contacting any provider.
faq.q3: How much does it cost for therapists to list?
faq.a3: We offer several advertising tiers starting from a free basic listing up to premium featured placements. Visit our Pricing page for details on advertising plans.
faq.q4: Can I book or pay through MasseurMatch?
faq.a4: No. MasseurMatch does not process bookings or payments. All arrangements, including scheduling and payment, are made directly between you and the provider.
faq.a5: Yes. Our directory is built specifically as an inclusive space for men seeking professional male massage services. We welcome the entire LGBTQ+ community.
faq.q6: How do I report a concern about a listing?
faq.a6: If you have concerns about a listing, please visit our Contact page or email us. We take all reports seriously and will review flagged listings promptly.
faq.a7: Absolutely not. Adult, explicit, or sexual content is strictly prohibited on MasseurMatch. Listings that violate this policy will be removed immediately.
faq.q8: Do I need an account to browse the directory?
faq.a8: No. Browsing the directory and contacting providers does not require an account. Provider accounts are only needed for those who wish to create a listing.
faq.a9: 'Featured' and 'Boosted' labels indicate that a provider has purchased enhanced advertising placement. These labels do not imply endorsement, verification, or recommendation by MasseurMatch.
